title: Ceara-Mirim Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Ceara-Mirim, with a Z-Score of +3.03. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Ceara-Mirim is characterized by high temperatures, with a CDD of 9.6 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 72%, while the wind speed is 23.5 km/h. 
 These conditions are expected to persist, exacerbating the heat wave's impact on the city.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the heat wave's effects immediately.
